scripts.test:backend:parallel: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "shop-api,shop-operator" "cd backend/apps/ShopAPI && composer test:parallel" "cd backend/apps/ShopOperator && composer test:parallel"
scripts.test:backend:pest:parallel: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "shop-api-pest,shop-operator-pest" "cd backend/apps/ShopAPI && composer test:pest:parallel" "cd backend/apps/ShopOperator && composer test:pest:parallel"
scripts.test:profile:offline: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "system,deploy,frontend-offline,backend-offline" "cd system-tests && npm test" "cd deploy/tests && npm test" "cd frontend && npm run test && npm run test:ui:mock" "npm run test:backend:parallel"
scripts.test:profile:installation-e2e: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "system,deploy,frontend-unit,frontend-api-online,frontend-e2e-online,backend" "cd system-tests && npm test" "cd deploy/tests && npm test" "cd frontend && npm run test" "cd frontend && npm run test:api:online" "cd frontend && npm run test:e2e" "npm run test:backend:parallel"
